title: (BUG) payment_watcher: out-of-order block heights from lightwalletd silently corrupt last_scanned_height
description: payment_watcher sets last_scanned_height=block.height unconditionally for each block. Only the height=0 guard exists; no monotonicity check. If lightwalletd sends out-of-order or repeated heights, the persisted scan tip can jump backwards, causing re-scanning of already-processed blocks. activate_subscription_atomic is idempotent but the retry exposes payment addresses in logs. scanner.rs has check_block_height_monotonic() that should be applied here too.
